title: Clinical Anatomy PhD Program Mission and Vision
content:
Clinical Anatomy PhD Program Mission and Vision

MISSION

The program aims to train Anatomy scientists who have the knowledge, skills, and equipment to independently plan and carry out multidisciplinary studies independently in the field of Anatomy and, if necessary, in cooperation with the relevant clinical departments, analyze and interpret the results, and train students at undergraduate and graduate level.

VISION

In the understanding of modern medical education, it has been essential to understand the anatomical basis/cause of the problems that will be faced by the physician in the professional life, rather than telling many details to the physician of the future, and to ensure that he solves them more consciously and controlled.

For this purpose, teaching modern anatomy knowledge and anatomy research techniques to the candidates who will become future anatomy faculty members will be very helpful in achieving the age of our medical education.
